items.title: Project test runner
items.scope: Detect Vitest, Jest, Pytest, Go, and Cargo tests and run them from one local panel.

items.title: WebSocket and server-sent event sessions
items.scope: Add long-lived HTTP workspace sessions while preserving secret handling and desktop network protections.

items.title: Cross-language notebook dataflow
items.scope: Let notebook cells react to values produced by another language without making execution implicit or opaque.

items.title: Integrated terminal
items.scope: A project-scoped desktop terminal designed for the same local-first security model as native runners.

items.title: Faster cold browser startup
items.scope: Language tokenizers already load on demand; remaining editor integrations are being isolated so Monaco core can leave the initial bundle.

items.title: Reliable multi-file projects
items.scope: Project tree, search, replace, templates, and bundle import/export ship today. Remaining work focuses on faster desktop search, binary fidelity, and template runtime smoke.

items.title: Complete CLI distribution
items.scope: Utility commands and Capsule validation ship today. File execution, Capsule replay, completions, signed binaries, and package publication remain.

items.title: Version-to-version migration coverage
items.scope: Add explicit Capsule migrations and automated upgrade journeys from an older stable release.

items.title: Deeper debugging controls
items.scope: JavaScript and TypeScript breakpoints and stepping ship today. Watch evaluation, conditional breakpoints, logpoints, and Python UI integration require additional security review and product work.

items.title: Multi-file import and sharing
items.scope: Share links, Capsules, cURL, Postman, Bruno files, Jupyter notebooks, and native notebooks ship today. Directory import, external playground migration, and a privacy-first multi-file viewer remain.
